match.userMessage:
Cinematic handheld shot of SCARLETT wearing a loose linen shirt striding along the wide ocean-side promenade, body in mid-motion with one foot lifted and shoulders angled forward, head turning back toward camera with an effortless glance, pale blue horizon and surfers cresting in the distance behind her, expansive sandy shoreline stretching out with weathered bench at the edge, bright morning coastal light casting clean directional shadows across the pavement and sand, high-key airy atmosphere with soft golden warmth in the highlights, shallow depth of field keeping the foreground promenade crisp while softening the distant waves, natural unfiltered daylight with immediate tactile energy, dynamic eye-level tracking angle with subtle handheld micro-movement.

  <reference-images>
    - Image 1 [CHARACTER REF]: SCARLETT - Match the real-world appearance of Sienna Blake exactly
    - Image 2 [LOCATION REF]: EXT. BONDI BEACH - Wide ocean-side promenade
    
    IMPORTANT: Reference images CARRY the visual identity of their labeled objects. When the prompt names an UPPERCASE element token, render it faithfully from its ELEMENT REF image — do not generate a new version from the prose. When the prompt names a LOCATION REF, use that image for the environment, lighting, and architectural identity. Prose describes how things are framed, lit, and positioned in the shot — it does not redefine what the reference already shows.
  </reference-images>
